headline: Trump threatens to deploy ICE agents to airports if DHS shutdown doesn't end, while Elon Musk offers to cover TSA agents' pay
summary: President Trump claimed ICE agents handling airport security would arrest immigrants who are in the U.S. illegally.

raw.headline: Trump threatens to deploy ICE agents to airports if DHS shutdown doesn't end, while Elon Musk offers to cover TSA agents' pay

headline: Elon Musk Offers To Cover TSA Salaries Amid Funding Crisis: 'Negatively Affecting Lives of So Many Americans'
summary: Elon Musk has said that he wants to cover Transportation Security Administration paychecks while a federal funding lapse leaves airport screeners working without salaries.

raw.headline: Elon Musk Offers To Cover TSA Salaries Amid Funding Crisis: 'Negatively Affecting Lives of So Many Americans'
raw.summary: Elon Musk has said that he wants to cover Transportation Security Administration paychecks while a federal funding lapse leaves airport screeners working without salaries.

headline: 3 Market Segments I'm Targeting When Iran War Ends
summary: IWM gives broad small-cap exposure hit by oil-price shocks. XLY stands to benefit when oil prices drop, as will JETS. Read here for more analysis.

headline: Opinion: As Trump eyes Cuba, my trips there a decade ago remind me how different things were
summary: Trump has threatened a 'friendly takeover' of Cuba after cutting it off from Venezuela's oil. CNBC's Justin Solomon reflects how different things used to be.
